title: Pan-Seared Parma with Affair Sauce
description: A simple yet elegant Italian dish featuring seared Parma ham and a tangy affair sauce.

ingredients.name: Affair sauce (mayonnaise, chopped fresh herbs, lemon juice)

instructions: Bring a skillet to medium heat.
Add a small amount of oil and sear the Parma ham slices for 2-3 minutes on each side.
While the ham is cooking, mix the affair sauce ingredients in a bowl.
Once the ham is cooked, remove it from the skillet and place it on a plate.
Add the affair sauce to the skillet and stir to combine with the remaining oil.
Season the sauce with salt to taste.
Serve the seared Parma ham with the affair sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and a squeeze of lemon juice.
